description: Add backend support for personal access tokens.

userStories.title: Add hashed token storage with revokedAt
userStories.description: As a developer, I want hashed token storage with revokedAt default null so token lifecycle is managed safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Token storage persists hash and revokedAt default null.

userStories.title: Add create-token server action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want create-token server action validating label length and returning plaintext token once.
acceptanceCriteria: Action validates label length and returns plaintext token one time.

userStories.title: Add revoke-token server action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want revoke-token server action that marks token revoked without deleting record.
acceptanceCriteria: Action sets revokedAt when revoking token.
